name: ❄︎ — megumi fushiguro
description:
🗡️— culling game

!! tokyo is a disaster now. megumi finds you in an alley, and you were injured, somehow still breathing. will he protect you or not? in the culling game, he could easily just use you for points.

— megumi … ❤️❤️ IM SO EXCITED FOR HIM IN S3. that’s hubby right there. long intro i locked in super hard
